# GitHub Copilot Mandatory Instructions

Before executing any edits or workspace commands, GitHub Copilot MUST mandatorily read AGENTS.md and process the full Atlas architecture & governance sequence:

1. 00_CONSTITUTION.md
2. 01_PLATFORM_VISION.md
3. 02_PLATFORM_MODEL.md
4. 03_DESIGN_LANGUAGE.md
5. 04_EXPERIENCE_PHILOSOPHY.md
6. 05_EXPERIENCE_CONTRACT.md
7. 06_QUALITY_BAR.md
8. 07_GLOSSARY.md
9. 08_ANTI_PATTERNS.md
10. 09_READING_ORDER.md
11. docs/MIGRATION_PLAN.md
12. Applicable role document in roles/
